top_signals.title: Top banking watchdogs issue stark warning over AI-driven cyber attacks
top_signals.summary: IT weaknesses could be exploited by frontier models in a ‘matter of minutes’, say ECB and ESRB
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Blocks Oil Sales in New Test of Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of Iranian oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Financial Policy Committee Record – July 2026
top_signals.summary: Our Financial Policy Committee (FPC) meets to identify risks to financial stability and agree policy actions aimed at safeguarding the resilience of the UK financial system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thai SEC Weighs Legal Action Against Major True Corp. Investor
top_signals.summary: Thailand’s market regulator is considering legal action against an investor over inconsistencies in seven disclosure reports linked to six listed companies, including a nearly $1 billion acquisition of shares in telecom giant True Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Army tests autonomous mass mine-laying
top_signals.summary: The Army’s Volcano mine dispenser can blanket 32 acres of terrain with up to 960 mines. Now, the Army is testing an autonomous version.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
